title: SpeedUp
description: A modpack that boosts FPS, improves visuals, and tries runs smoothly on low-end PCs all while staying server-friendly.
body:
This modpack was made for players who want Minecraft to look amazing without having much lag. It’s lightweight and fast modpack to boost performance and visuals at the same time.
 
##  💡 What to expect:
  
- good performance while making minecraft look good
  
- Quality-of-life tweaks that make the game feel smoother

- texturepacks that make the game look better

##  🌐 Multiplayer Friendly:
- 100% server compatible – perfect for playing on servers!

- Works great on vanilla servers
 
- No game-changing mods, so you won’t break server rules or mechanics

##  ⚙️ Main Mods:
- 🚀 Sodium – major FPS improvements

- 🌍 C2ME – optimized world generation

- 🧠 FerriteCore – lower memory usage
